# Qspecs

Parent: [Monster Swarm](../README.md)

Open-source package support files for the Qspecs module.

## Key Files

- `deepseek-r1-1.5b.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `codestral-22b-openai.qspec.json`: Live OpenAI-compatible coding gate for the
  Codestral mesh route; requires a valid typed `clamp` implementation, not only
  marker words. The implementation may use either `Math.min/Math.max` or the
  equivalent min/max conditional branches.
- `falcon-mamba-7b.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `flux-1-schnell.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `gemma3-4b-it.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `gemma4-12b-it.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `gemma4-31b-it-heretic-ara.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `gemma4-31b-it.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `gemma4-e4b-heretic.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `jamba-1.5-mini.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `llama-3.2-3b.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `llama-3.3-70b.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `loki-8b-erotica.qspec.json`: Source file in this module.
- `unlimited-ocr.qspec.json`: Multimodal OCR gate for the Unlimited-OCR GGUF
  decoder plus F16 projector.
- ...and additional source files.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
